ai_tips: Starting out at 3m — 4.54km ahead with 31m of climbing on the profile. 从海拔3米出发——全程4.54公里，累计爬升31米。
0.35km in — pace 5:29/km as the effort builds. 进行到0.35公里——配速5:29/公里，强度正在建立。
Halfway to the high point — 0m of the 5m climb done, grade here -5.4%. Short, quick steps keep this efficient. 爬升至最高点过半——5米总爬升已完成0米，此处坡度-5.4%。缩小步幅、加快步频会更省力。
High point of the route: 9m at 3.12km. From here the route mostly gives back. 全程最高点9米，位于3.12公里处。此后路线总体向下。
Steepest descent of the day: -7.9% at 3.81km — you kept it controlled at 6:17/km, protecting the legs. 全天最陡的下坡：3.81公里处坡度-7.9%——你稳健控制在6:17/公里，保护了腿部。
4.37km — late-run check: pace 6:22/km, still holding form well. 4.37公里——后程检查：配速6:22/公里，节奏保持得不错。
Finished 4.54km in 27:02 (avg 5:57/km, +31m). Solid, steady effort end to end. 完成4.54公里，用时27:02（平均配速5:57/公里，爬升31米）。全程稳定扎实。
